trailer_summary: Prestige global thriller trailer built from local production docs.
homepage_hook: She went there to help. Then she disappeared. When she came back, she didn't exist.
investor_blurb: A humanitarian returns from a conflict zone erased from every system, while a decoder uncovers a hidden signal meant for all of humanity.

shot_prompts.description: Aerial wide of a conflict zone at dusk — smoke rising over a city skyline
Close-up of a woman's eyes — determined, scanning a crowd
Aid worker insignia being torn from a jacket — slow motion
Terminal screen: 'RECORD NOT FOUND' — cursor blinking
Woman walking through an airport — crowds blur around her, she is perfectly still
Decoder staring at oscilloscope — a signal pulses in the waveform
Rapid intercut: satellite dishes, data centers, faces on screens
Black frame — title card: REMEMBER HER

voiceover_script:
She went there to help.

Then she disappeared.

When she came back…

…she didn't exist.

Not in any record. Not in any system.

But someone remembered.

And they left a signal.

REMEMBER HER.

Coming soon to a screen near you.
